title: Cruise missile heading inbound
description: Germany is urgently trying to buy Tomahawk missiles from the United States, - Financial Times According to the publication, Berlin has renewed efforts to purchase American Tomahawk cruise missiles and Typhon launchers after the Pentagon refused to place a US missile battalion in Germany. German Defense Minister Boris Pistorius is planning a trip to Washington to personally promote the deal. In Berlin, they fear...

description_uk: Германия пытается срочно купить у США ракеты Tomahawk, - Financial Times По данным издания, Берлин возобновил попытки приобрести американские крылатые ракеты Tomahawk и пусковые установки Typhon после того, как Пентагон отказался размещать в Германии ракетный батальон США. title: Russia is strengthening its positions and preparing for a new...

description: Russia is strengthening its positions and preparing for a new offensive after May 11, - ISW According to the Institute for the Study of War, the Russian army is using the announced "truce" to regroup, strengthen its positions, and prepare for increased offensive actions after May 11. In particular, the occupiers strengthened their positions in the Kupyan, Lyman, and Slavic directions, as well as in the north...
description_en: Russia is strengthening its positions and preparing for a new offensive after May 11, - ISW According to the Institute for the Study of War, the Russian army is using the announced "truce" to regroup, strengthen its positions, and prepare for increased offensive actions after May 11. In particular, the occupiers strengthened their positions in the Kupyan, Lyman, and Slavic directions, as well as in the north...
description_uk: россия укрепляет позиции и готовится к новому наступлению после 11 мая, - ISW По данным Института изучения войны, российская армия использует объявленное "перемирие" для перегруппировки, укрепления позиций и подготовки к усилению наступательных действий после 11 мая. В частности, оккупанты осуществили укрепление позиций на Купянском, Лиманском и Славянском направлениях, а также на севере...

title: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most...
title_en: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most...
title_uk: Сьогодні день матері. І особливо сьогодні я хочу сказати найбільше...
description: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most important word - thank you. Thank you for absolute love, which certainly knows no bounds, and for everything a mother does for her child and family. The conditions of the war changed the lives of millions of Ukrainian families. And Ukrainian mothers today are about incredible endurance, courage, bravery and love, which helps to persevere. Thank you to every mother for life, for believing in your...
description_en: Today is Mother's Day. And especially today I want to say the most important word - thank you. Thank you for absolute love, which certainly knows no bounds, and for everything a mother does for her child and family. The conditions of the war changed the lives of millions of Ukrainian families. And Ukrainian mothers today are about incredible endurance, courage, bravery and love, which helps to persevere. Thank you to every mother for life, for believing in your...
description_uk: Сьогодні День матері. І особливо сьогодні хочеться сказати найважливіше слово – дякую. Дякуємо за абсолютну любов, яка точно не знає меж, і за все, що мама робить для дитини й родини. Умови війни змінили життя мільйонів українських родин. І українські мами сьогодні – це про неймовірну витримку, сміливість, хоробрість і любов, яка допомагає вистояти. Дякую кожній мамі за життя, за віру у своїх...

title: Drone attack
description: Satellites showed how "Alabuga" has grown, where "Geraniums" are collected. The territory of the "Alabuga" special economic zone in the marshes has expanded by approximately 340 hectares per hour. It is there that part of the Geran type drones are manufactured, with which the Russians regularly attack Ukrainian cities. A comparison of satellite images for May 2025 and May 2026 shows the active construction of new hangars, as well as the expansion of...
description_en: Satellites showed how "Alabuga" has grown, where "Geraniums" are collected. The territory of the "Alabuga" special economic zone in the marshes has expanded by approximately 340 hectares per hour. It is there that part of the Geran type drones are manufactured, with which the Russians regularly attack Ukrainian cities. A comparison of satellite images for May 2025 and May 2026 shows the active construction of new hangars, as well as the expansion of...
description_uk: Спутники показали, как выросла "Алабуга", где собирают "Герани" Территория особой экономической зоны "Алабуга" на болотах за год расширилась примерно на 340 гектаров. Именно там производится часть дронов типа "Герань", которыми рашисты регулярно атакуют украинские города. Сравнение спутниковых снимков за май 2025 и май 2026 года показывает активное строительство новых ангаров, а также расширение...

title: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience,...
title_en: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience,...
title_uk: Дорогі українські матері! Я дякую кожному з вас за терпіння,...
description: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience, support and that invisible strength that keeps our people going in the most difficult times. In every protector there is maternal wisdom, support, fortitude and self-sacrifice. It is your words, your hugs and faith that help our soldiers to stand and fight for the future of Ukraine. I bow to the mothers whose sons and daughters gave the most valuable for Ukraine...
description_en: Dear Ukrainian mothers! I thank each of you for your patience, support and that invisible strength that keeps our people going in the most difficult times. In every protector there is maternal wisdom, support, fortitude and self-sacrifice. It is your words, your hugs and faith that help our soldiers to stand and fight for the future of Ukraine. I bow to the mothers whose sons and daughters gave the most valuable for Ukraine...
description_uk: Дорогі українські матері! Дякую кожній із вас за терпіння, підтримку й ту невидиму силу, що тримає наш народ у найважчі часи. У кожному захисникові й захисниці — материнська мудрість, підтримка, сила духу та самопожертва. Саме ваші слова, ваші обійми й віра допомагають нашим воїнам вистояти та боротися за майбутнє України. Доземно вклоняюся матерям, чиї сини й дочки віддали за Україну найцінніше...

title: Kharkiv: Drone strike
description: Russian drone strikes apartment building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into ceasefire. The drone attack hit a nine-story residential building in the city's Industrial district, Kharkiv Oblast Governor Oleh Syniehubov said on May 9 — the first day of a three-day truce meant to last until May 11.
description_en: Russian drone strikes apartment building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into ceasefire. The drone attack hit a nine-story residential building in the city's Industrial district, Kharkiv Oblast Governor Oleh Syniehubov said on May 9 — the first day of a three-day truce meant to last until May 11.
description_uk: Russian drone strikes apartment building in Kharkiv less than 24 hours into ceasefire. description: 🇪🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga: "Happy Europe Day! For Ukrainians, Europe has never been just a geography. It has always been an idea - dignity, freedom, democracy and the right of peoples to choose their own future. Today, Ukraine is not only defending itself. We are defending the values ​​on which Europe is built: freedom, democracy and human dignity. That is why Ukraine's struggle is also...
description_en: 🇪🇺 Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andrii Sybiga: "Happy Europe Day! For Ukrainians, Europe has never been just a geography. It has always been an idea - dignity, freedom, democracy and the right of peoples to choose their own future. Today, Ukraine is not only defending itself. We are defending the values ​​on which Europe is built: freedom, democracy and human dignity. That is why Ukraine's struggle is also...
description_uk: 🇪🇺 Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга: "З Днем Європи! Для українців Європа ніколи не була лише географією. Вона завжди була ідеєю – гідності, свободи, демократії та права народів самостійно обирати своє майбутнє. Сьогодні Україна захищає не лише себе. Ми захищаємо цінності, на яких побудована Європа: свободу, демократію та людську гідність. Саме тому боротьба України – це також...

title: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after...
title_en: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after...
title_uk: У Дніпрі він відвідав наших військових, які проходять лікування після...
description: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after being wounded. He thanked for his service to Ukraine, for his strength and resilience and honored him with state awards. He also spoke with the doctors of the hospital and awarded him the orders of Danylo Halytskyi and Princess Olga of the 3rd degree, the medals "For Military Service to Ukraine" and "For Saved Life". It is thanks to such people that the lives of our defenders are saved every day. Thank you...
description_en: In Dnipro, he visited our soldiers who are undergoing treatment after being wounded. He thanked for his service to Ukraine, for his strength and resilience and honored him with state awards. He also spoke with the doctors of the hospital and awarded him the orders of Danylo Halytskyi and Princess Olga of the 3rd degree, the medals "For Military Service to Ukraine" and "For Saved Life". It is thanks to such people that the lives of our defenders are saved every day. Thank you...
description_uk: У Дніпрі відвідав наших воїнів, які проходять лікування після поранень. Подякував за службу Україні, за силу і стійкість та відзначив державними нагородами. Поспілкувався і з медиками госпіталю та нагородив орденами Данила Галицького і княгині Ольги ІІІ ступеня, медалями «За військову службу Україні» та «За врятоване життя». Саме завдяки таким людям щодня рятуються життя наших захисників. Дякую...
